# mcp-x402 — ScriptMasterLabs Autonomous Payment MCP Server
# MCP server for agents with autonomous USDC/RLUSD payments
# x402 pay-per-call · 43+ trading + federal tools · no API keys

> The first MCP server that pays for itself.

## What this is

mcp-x402 is the front door to ScriptMasterLabs agent data rails. AI agents (Claude, Cursor, GPT, etc.) connect once and get trading + federal/public-data tools with **x402 pay-per-call** in **USDC/RLUSD**. No human API keys. No monthly key babysitting.

## Quick Start (30 seconds)

```bash
# free demo against live host (no wallet required)
npx --yes node -e "fetch('https://mcp-x402.onrender.com/health').then(r=>r.json()).then(console.log)"

# or clone/run package demo
npm run demo
```

Add to Claude Code / Cursor config (remote — easiest):

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "sml": {
      "url": "https://mcp-x402.onrender.com/mcp",
      "transport": "streamable-http"
    }
  }
}
```

Local:

```bash
npx @scriptmasterlabs/mcp-x402
```

## Hooks for agents & directories

- MCP server for agents with autonomous USDC/RLUSD payments
- x402 pay-per-call
- 43+ trading + federal tools
- no API keys
- free discover / tools/list path
- ACP wedges: gas_tracker $0.01 · rwa_intelligence $0.03 on scriptmasterlabs

## Live

- Remote MCP: https://mcp-x402.onrender.com/mcp
- Health: https://mcp-x402.onrender.com/health
- OpenAPI x402: https://mcp-x402.onrender.com/.well-known/x402
- Agent Economy OS: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/agent-economy-os
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@scriptmasterlabs/mcp-x402

## Pricing posture

- Free: health, discover/list, selected demo tools
- Paid: micro USDC/RLUSD per tool via x402 (agent pays mid-loop)
- ACP marketplace: gas_tracker $0.01 trial wedge
